name: Alex Johnson
summary: Highly skilled Senior React Frontend Engineer with 7+ years of experience in building scalable and user-friendly web applications. Proven ability to lead frontend development, mentor junior engineers, and collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.

experience.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
experience.description: Led the development of a new customer portal using React and TypeScript, improving user engagement by 25%. Mentored a team of 4 frontend developers, conducted code reviews, and implemented best practices for maintainable code. Collaborated with UX/UI designers and backend engineers to define and implement new features.

experience.title: Frontend Engineer
experience.description: Developed and maintained responsive web applications using React, Redux, and modern JavaScript. Contributed to the redesign of the company's main product interface, resulting in a 15% increase in conversion rates. Worked closely with product managers to translate requirements into technical specifications.

experience.title: Junior Frontend Developer
experience.description: Assisted in the development of client websites and web applications using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Gained experience with frontend frameworks and version control systems. Participated in daily stand-ups and contributed to team projects.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering
